featured.headline: FISA Section 702 reauthorized — again — with zero reform. 78 senators voted yes from both parties.
featured.dek: No warrant requirement added. No limits on domestic queries. Civil liberties groups from the left and right opposed it. Both party leaderships whipped for passage anyway.
